deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. May 1 close target. CMA: 31 comps, $207K avg, $266K est value.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for branded analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via homesteadvested.com link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters ended listing after March. Isaac Linares development interest (~$150K offer) did not move forward. Signs picked up. Chris walking away.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved from property. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development concept.
Isaac Linares discussed mobile home development: half units for displaced veterans, half for profit. Sisters enthusiastic about angle.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 2,972 sqft, pool, outdoor kitchen. VA loan $486K balance, ~$493K payoff. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Sellers moving back in. Plan to relist after updates and repairs.
deals.next: Mutual termination released May 29. Confirm signed termination received back.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property. Plan to make updates and repairs, relist when timing is right.
Called Matt and Chandler. Shared honest financial picture. Chandler was laid off. Short sale likely path. Relationship intact.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build, Laura Heights PUD. Listed $259,900 May 14. June deadline (relocating NC). Multiple showings. Second-look buyers are hottest lead.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers agent on movement after pre-inspection offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back for second showing. Their favorite property. Walk-in closet noted as slightly small. Pre-inspection report offered.
Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. First showing 9:15am. Cultural concern about street direction noted.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $255,578 (Feb 2026, ~$257K today). Thin market CMA. Recommended list price $295K. Divorce situation. Met May 15.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Confirm acreage. Confirm renovation status. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled: thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Built listing presentation with net sheet.
Prior VA loan clients. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved. Buyer: military.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket and trolley to Joy. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Send thank you note to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo on Apr 21. Chicago Title handled closing.
Lien release picked up from mobile notary. Released delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property (19.71 in A-735, 0.29 in A-756). Contract at $113,000 with Espinoza buyers. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain (tmail.com vs gmail.com).

logs.m: Espinoza buyers under contract at $113K. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received. Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title handling escrow.
Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked: Conex contents, camper, deer feeders.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Matt Toney (HouzzPro) contractor. Drywall, paint, flooring in progress.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) to confirm new meter install status. Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) on water service. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Visited property. Installed 3 cameras, fully covered. Electricians reconnected from pole to meter. Drywall complete, second round paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow. Baseboards after flooring. Water meter 1-2 days.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Kelly got mileage approved. Police reports still stalled.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief healing plants story. Potential content collaboration: Healing Through Gardens.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story on social media.

leads.title: Isaac — Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. Buy box unknown. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold).

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor — Son
leads.detail: Neighbor behind Miss Pat may have passed away. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Probate or inherited property situation. Son not yet contacted.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat (son name, contact info). Reach out with garden angle first, realtor second. Be sensitive to recent loss.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Confirm wife VA eligibility (branch, service status). Connect with VA-approved lender.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent (Schertz/Cibolo). Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property. Understand financing and work scope.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: Green Bliss rental setup (his uncle Jimbo), and his mom Milagros buying new construction (Grace Gardens, Lennar).
leads.next: New construction buyer (Milagros) is the hot play. Must register as buyer agent on first builder visit. Confirm visit timing Wed or Thu with Brandon and mom.

logs.m: Reached out to builders for inventory. Rate buydowns are key angle. Milagros buyer rep sent but not yet signed.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Landlord renovating both sides, rents going up. Need to move faster. Pivoting to new construction (rate buydowns, incentives). No HOA firm requirement. Pre-approval ~$122K.
leads.next: If 301 W Saxet Corpus deal falls through, revisit new construction search. Confirm Zach pre-approval status.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/mo rent. Military retirement + daughters disability income. Between jobs. Fixing credit on her own. VA loan eligible, zero down. Nextdoor connection (High Country). Motivated buyer.
leads.next: Call or text today. Has been overdue since Apr 30. Connect with VA-approved lender when she responds. Qualify timeline, budget, target area.

logs.m: Flagged to call today. Do not let this slip again. VA buyer, motivated, hot lead.
Spoke today. Sick grandkid, not right time to push. Warm conversation. Follow up tomorrow.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. That listing under contract at $275K. Kurt wants intel on offers received and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes details. Report back to Kurt on market situation.

priorities.title: Pamela Moore — VA Buyer Call
priorities.notes: Military retirement + disability income. $1,700/mo rent. VA loan eligible, zero down. Has been flagged since Apr 30. Do not let slip.

followUps.text: Call or text Pamela today at 872-822-0656
Connect with VA-approved lender once she responds
Qualify timeline, budget, target area in San Antonio

priorities.title: Milagros Stringer — New Construction Buyer Registration
priorities.sub: Brandon Moran connection, high commission potential
priorities.notes: Mom of Brandon. Looking for new construction Grace Gardens / Lennar area. Must register as buyer agent on FIRST builder visit. Critical. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment.

followUps.text: Confirm Wed or Thu visit timing with Brandon
Call Carlos McLean (210-605-0241) at Grace Gardens before visit
Register as buyer agent on first builder visit — must happen before she goes alone

priorities.title: 10023 Mill Path — Second-Look Buyers Follow-up
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers are favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Showing rescheduled to May 30. Decisions expected in 1-2 weeks.

followUps.text: Confirm May 30 showing time with buyers agent
Follow up after showing for any movement on pre-inspection offer
Monitor for backup offer submission from other agent

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 — Utility Setup & Listing Submission
priorities.sub: REO cleanup nearly complete, move to listing
priorities.notes: Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending 1-2 days. Cameras installed. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham (Priority Bank).

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) confirm new meter install status
Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) confirm water service setup
Submit listing agreement to Jerry + Ray at Priority Bank

priorities.sub: Espinoza buyers under contract, need paperwork in
priorities.notes: Contract at $113K. Earnest money not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier. Chicago Title (Alyssa Castillo) handling escrow.

followUps.text: Confirm earnest money deposit received from buyer
Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier
Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain (tmail.com or gmail.com)
